_comment: Available content packs for download via GET MORE panel. URLs will point to CDN when live. Currently uses Project Gutenberg for public domain texts.

packs.name: Bible Commentary Pack
packs.description: Matthew Henry's Complete Commentary on the whole Bible (1706) — verse-by-verse exposition.

files.name: Matthew Henry Commentary — Vol. 1 (Genesis–Numbers)
files.description: Classic Puritan commentary, public domain since 1706

files.name: Matthew Henry Commentary — New Testament
files.description: NT commentary from Acts through Revelation

packs.name: Extended Medical Pack
packs.description: Advanced offline medical references — anatomy, materia medica, and field surgery guides.

files.name: Merck's Manual of Materia Medica (1899)
files.description: Drug references, dosages, and treatments — 1899 edition

files.name: Home Nursing (American Red Cross, 1918)
files.description: Field nursing and emergency care for non-professionals

packs.name: Homestead & Agriculture Pack
packs.description: Off-grid farming, herbalism, food preservation, and self-sufficient living references.

files.name: Culpeper's Complete Herbal (1653)
files.description: Classic herbal medicine reference — 400+ medicinal plants

files.name: Ten Acres Enough (1864)
files.description: Practical guide to small farm self-sufficiency

files.name: Farm and Garden Rule-Book (1911)
files.description: Practical farming rules, planting calendars, animal husbandry

packs.name: Philosophy & Wisdom Pack
packs.description: Extended collection of Stoic philosophy, classical wisdom, and moral reasoning texts.

files.name: The Republic — Plato
files.description: Plato's foundational work on justice, governance, and the ideal society

files.name: The Letters of Marcus Aurelius
files.description: Personal letters and extended writings of the Stoic emperor

files.name: Letters of Seneca to Lucilius
files.description: 124 moral epistles on Stoic philosophy and how to live well
